---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something that is not working correctly
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Observe error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or stack traces.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- Version / Branch: [e.g. v1.2.3 or main@abc1234]
- Runtime (if applicable): [e.g. Node 20]

## Additional Context

Any other context relevant to this bug.
